title: AI Governance Compliance Artifacts
description: Templates, tools, and deliverables that support AI governance implementation.

artifacts.name: AI Governance Charter Template
artifacts.description: Template for establishing AI governance body, authority, scope, and reporting lines.

artifacts.name: AI Ethics Policy Template
artifacts.description: Organization-wide AI ethics policy covering principles, obligations, and escalation.

artifacts.name: AI Acceptable Use Policy
artifacts.description: Policy defining permitted and prohibited uses of AI within the organization.

artifacts.name: AI Policy Suite Template
artifacts.description: Comprehensive policy framework template covering acceptable use, ethics, risk appetite, and compliance requirements.

artifacts.name: AI Responsibility Assignment Matrix Template
artifacts.description: RACI matrix template covering all AI lifecycle phases with named accountability for system outcomes.

artifacts.name: AI Risk Assessment Template
artifacts.description: Standardized template for assessing AI system risks across all risk domains.

artifacts.name: AI Risk Register Template
artifacts.description: Centralized register for tracking identified AI risks, mitigations, and owners.

artifacts.name: AI System Classification Guide
artifacts.description: Guide for classifying AI systems by risk level aligned with EU AI Act tiers.

artifacts.name: AI System Classification Register Template
artifacts.description: Template for maintaining a register of all AI systems with risk tier, rationale, and review dates.

artifacts.name: Training Data Inventory Template
artifacts.description: Template for cataloging all training datasets with provenance, quality metrics, and legal basis.

artifacts.name: Data Quality Checklist
artifacts.description: Checklist for assessing training data quality (completeness, accuracy, representativeness, timeliness).

artifacts.name: Bias Testing Report Template
artifacts.description: Template for documenting fairness metrics, identified bias, and mitigation actions.

artifacts.name: AI Data Protection Impact Assessment Template
artifacts.description: DPIA template specific to AI systems covering training data, inference, model memorization, and data leakage risks.

artifacts.name: Fairness Impact Assessment Template
artifacts.description: Template for assessing differential impact on demographic groups including intersectional analysis.

artifacts.name: AI System Test Plan Template
artifacts.description: Comprehensive test plan template covering functional, performance, fairness, safety, and adversarial testing categories.

artifacts.name: Deployment Readiness Checklist Template
artifacts.description: Pre-deployment checklist covering technical validation, governance approvals, compliance verification, and monitoring setup.

artifacts.name: Explainability Requirements and Implementation Guide
artifacts.description: Guide for defining explainability requirements by risk level and implementing appropriate explanation methods.

artifacts.name: AI System Transparency Card
artifacts.description: Per-system card disclosing purpose, data sources, limitations, and contact information.

artifacts.name: Model Card Template
artifacts.description: Technical model card following Mitchell et al. format with performance, limitations, and intended use.

artifacts.name: AI Impact Notice Template
artifacts.description: User-facing notice template for disclosing AI involvement in decisions.

artifacts.name: AI Security Testing Playbook
artifacts.description: Playbook for AI-specific security testing covering adversarial attacks, data poisoning, model extraction, and prompt injection.

artifacts.name: AI Access Control Policy Template
artifacts.description: Access control policy template specific to AI assets including models, datasets, and inference endpoints.

artifacts.name: AI Audit Checklist
artifacts.description: Comprehensive checklist for internal AI governance audits covering all 11 control domains.

artifacts.name: Conformity Self-Assessment Template
artifacts.description: Self-assessment template aligned with EU AI Act conformity requirements.

artifacts.name: Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment Template
artifacts.description: FRIA template for high-risk AI systems per EU Art. 27.

artifacts.name: AI Incident Report Template
artifacts.description: Structured template for reporting AI incidents with classification, timeline, and resolution.

artifacts.name: AI Monitoring Dashboard Specification
artifacts.description: Specification template for AI system monitoring dashboards covering performance, drift, fairness, and operational metrics.

artifacts.name: Societal and Environmental Impact Assessment Template
artifacts.description: Template for assessing broader societal impacts including employment effects, environmental footprint, and social cohesion.

gold_standard.name: Master Information Security Policy (ISP)
gold_standard.description: The foundational Tier-1 policy mapped to ISO 27001, NIST CSF, and local regulations.

gold_standard.name: Statement of Applicability (SoA)
gold_standard.description: Formal assessment of ISO 27001 Annex A controls against organizational scope.

gold_standard.name: Risk Treatment Plan (RTP)
gold_standard.description: Detailed mapping of unacceptable risks to specific technical and organizational controls.

gold_standard.name: Cyber Incident Response Plan (CIRP)
gold_standard.description: The definitive response framework for Sev-1 to Sev-4 incidents with statutory notification SLAs.

gold_standard.name: Business Continuity Plan (BCP)
gold_standard.description: Resilience framework defining RTO/RPO targets and failover strategies for critical services.

gold_standard.name: Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) Policy
gold_standard.description: Vendor lifecycle management framework based on NIST SP 800-161 and RMiT Appendix 7.

gold_standard.name: Data Classification & Handling Standard
gold_standard.description: Unified classification levels (C1-C4) with mandatory handling controls.

gold_standard.name: Identity & Access Management (IAM) Policy
gold_standard.description: Strict RBAC, MFA, and PAM requirements aligned with CIS Control 5.
